text:
Created attachment 171229
mcelog.diff

This patch will update mcelog to the most current version.

* Updated to 138

- Always use decimal to print cpu family/model numbers.

portlint -AC:
WARN: /usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/sysutils/mcelog/pkg-message: possible use of absolute pathname "/path/to/log". (false pos)
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.

poudriere bulk -tC:
11amd64: success
11i386: success
103amd64: success
103i386: success
93amd64: success
93i386: success
